name: Destiny Mark
how_to_obtain: Found on wild encounter Pokémon encountered on the date registered as the player's birthday

name: Fishing Mark
how_to_obtain: Only obtainable in Sword and Shield via fishing

name: Gourmand Mark
how_to_obtain: Chance to be granted to party Pokémon after making a sandwich or buying food from shops

name: Itemfinder Mark
how_to_obtain: Chance to be granted to the lead Pokémon in the player's party when an item is picked up.

name: Jumbo Mark
how_to_obtain: Show a Pokémon with a Scale of 255 to the Hiker near the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center

name: Mini Mark
how_to_obtain: Show a Pokémon with a Scale of 0 to the Hiker near the Mesagoza (West) Pokémon Center

name: Partner Mark
how_to_obtain: Chance to be granted to party Pokémon every 10000 player steps, if the Pokémon has friendship of 200+

name: Rare Mark
how_to_obtain: Only found on wild encounter Pokémon

name: Uncommon Mark
how_to_obtain: Only found on wild encounter Pokémon

name: Alpha Mark
how_to_obtain: Transfer an alpha Pokémon from Legends: Arceus via HOME

name: Mightiest Mark
how_to_obtain: Found on Pokémon caught in 7★ Tera Raid Battles via Poké Portal News events Granted to certain Pokémon that defeat special 7★ raid challenges

name: Titan Mark
how_to_obtain: Found on former Titan Pokémon that reappear after obtaining their Titan Badge
